meaning: n.断崖,绝壁,诈骗adj.绝壁的,直率的vt.vi诈骗,
examples: He said he would resign if he didn't get more money, but it was only a bluff.
It was answered from under the bluff.
Early the next morning in Bluff, Utah, we meet our tour guide, archaeologist Vaughn Hadenfeldt.
But, for the moment at any rate, it is his words that are bluff.
